title: 1: Code Maintainability
1.1: Creates rrdhost-system-info.h header under src/database/ with an opaque struct type
1.2: Implements rrdhost_system_info_create() for allocating a new system info struct
1.3: Provides rrdhost_system_info_hops() getter returning int16_t
1.4: Provides rrdhost_system_info_hops_set() setter accepting int16_t
1.5: Implements rrdhost_system_info_set_by_name() for environment variable field parsing
1.6: Provides rrdhost_system_info_install_type() and rrdhost_system_info_prebuilt_dist() read accessors
1.7: Provides rrdhost_system_info_ml_capable_set(), rrdhost_system_info_ml_enabled_set(), and rrdhost_system_info_mc_version_set() setters
1.8: Consolidates v1 info endpoint JSON output into rrdhost_system_info_to_json_v1()
1.9: Consolidates v2 contexts endpoint JSON output into rrdhost_system_info_to_json_v2()
1.10: Consolidates streaming handshake encoding into rrdhost_system_info_to_url_encode_stream()
1.11: Consolidates system info to label export into rrdhost_system_info_to_rrdlabels()
1.12: Implements rrdhost_system_info_from_host_labels() for creating system info from labels
1.13: Consolidates sqlite key/value persistence into rrdhost_system_info_foreach()
1.14: Consolidates ACLK node info population into rrdhost_system_info_to_node_info()
1.15: Moves system detection logic into rrdhost_system_info_detect()
1.16: Simplifies get_install_type() to accept struct rrdhost_system_info * directly
1.17: Promotes buffer_key_value_urlencode() to a shared header

1.18: Replaces all 24 direct struct field accesses in external consumers with accessor function calls, including rrdhost_system_info_hops() in aclk.c (6 sites), aclk_rx_msgs.c (1 site), rrdfunctions.c (1 site), rrdhost-status.c (1 site), stream-connector.c (1 site), sqlite_metadata.c (2 sites), api_v1_info.c (1 site), rrdhost_system_info_hops_set() in sqlite_aclk.c (1 site) and stream-receiver-connection.c (2 sites), rrdhost_system_info_ml_capable_set/ml_enabled_set/mc_version_set in rrdhost.c (3 sites) and stream-receiver-connection.c (3 sites), rrdhost_system_info_install_type/prebuilt_dist in analytics.c (2 sites) ...
1.19: Updates CMakeLists.txt to include new system info module files in the build
2: Documentation Maintainability
3: Artifact Cleanup
3.1: Removes the full struct rrdhost_system_info definition from rrd.h
4: Negative Rubrics
4.1: Introduces circular header dependency between rrdhost-system-info.h and rrd.h
4.2: Removes rrdhost_system_info_free() from the public API without replacement
4.3: Changes the key names in the URL encoded streaming handshake parameters
